'''sawadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelide|nickelide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelide|nickelide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sawadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwædhæth|sæwædhæth]] || [[word:sæwædhæj|sæwædhæj]] || [[word:sæwædhæsh|sæwædhæsh]] || [[word:sæwædhæ|sæwædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawawadhath|sawawadhath]] || [[word:sawawadhaj|sawawadhaj]] || [[word:sawawadhash|sawawadhash]] || [[word:sawawadha|sawawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawadhath|sawadhath]] || [[word:sawadhaj|sawadhaj]] || [[word:sawadhash|sawadhash]] || [[word:sawadha|sawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawafdhath|sawafdhath]] || [[word:sawafdhaj|sawafdhaj]] || [[word:sawafdhash|sawafdhash]] || [[word:sawafdhaf|sawafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawadhatha|sawadhatha]] || [[word:sawadhaja|sawadhaja]] || [[word:sawadhasha|sawadhasha]] || [[word:sawadhaka|sawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawadhath|sawadhath]] || [[word:sawadhaj|sawadhaj]] || [[word:sawadhash|sawadhash]] || [[word:sawadha|sawadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawadhathal|sawadhathal]] || [[word:sawadhajal|sawadhajal]] || [[word:sawadhashal|sawadhashal]] || [[word:sawadhakal|sawadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawadhathatha|sawadhathatha]] || [[word:sawadhajaja|sawadhajaja]] || [[word:sawadhashasha|sawadhashasha]] || [[word:sawadhaka|sawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawadhathan|sawadhathan]] || [[word:sawadhajan|sawadhajan]] || [[word:sawadhashan|sawadhashan]] || [[word:sawadhakan|sawadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawadhathaoro|sawadhathaoro]] || [[word:sawadhajaoro|sawadhajaoro]] || [[word:sawadhashaoro|sawadhashaoro]] || [[word:sawadhakaoro|sawadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
